title: HIITL Execution Envelope
description: Language-neutral specification for the execution envelope. Source of truth for all language implementations.

schema_version.description: Version of this envelope schema. Format: 'v{major}.{minor}'

org_id.description: Organization identifier. Tenant isolation boundary. Format: org_{random}

environment.description: Environment this action is executing in. Isolation boundary within org.

agent_id.description: Stable identifier for the agent (across runs). SDK config value.

agent_instance_id.description: Per-run instance identifier for the agent. Optional. Useful for distributed systems.

user_id.description: End-user identifier (if action is on behalf of a user). Optional.

session_id.description: Session identifier. Optional. Groups actions within a user session.

action_id.description: Client-generated unique identifier for this action. Format: act_{ulid or uuid}

idempotency_key.description: Idempotency key for deduplication. Prevents duplicate execution on retry. Client-generated.

correlation_id.description: Correlation ID for distributed tracing. Optional. Auto-propagated from execution context.

trace_id.description: OpenTelemetry trace ID. Optional. Auto-propagated from execution context.

action.description: Name of the action being evaluated. Primary classification field. Replaces tool_name (which is accepted as a backward-compatible alias).

action_type.description: Type classification for the action. Optional secondary classification.

operation.description: CRUD operation type. Indicates the nature of the action. Defaults to 'execute' if omitted.

target.description: Resource identifiers. What is this action targeting? Structured JSON. Defaults to empty object if omitted.

parameters.description: Structured action parameters. Action-specific. JSON object. Defaults to empty object if omitted.

sensitivity.description: Risk signal: sensitivity classification. Multiple classifications allowed.

cost_estimate.description: Risk signal: estimated cost of this action. Optional.

confidence.description: Risk signal: confidence score from upstream AI system. Optional. Range 0.0-1.0.

requested_scopes.description: Risk signal: permission scopes requested for this action. Optional.

reason.description: Context: brief reason for this action. For audit trail. Limited length. DO NOT include full prompts.

prompt_hash.description: Context: hash of the prompt that led to this action. Optional. For audit without logging full prompt.

policy_refs.description: Context: references to policies that should apply. Optional. Usually determined server-side.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when envelope was created. Required. Used for replay attack prevention.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature of canonical envelope representation. Required. Prevents tampering.

signature_version.description: Signature algorithm version. For future migration. Optional, defaults to 'hmac-sha256-v1'.

metadata.description: Additional metadata. Optional. Not used in policy evaluation. Free-form.

$comment: Version 1.1 - Renamed tool_name to action. Made operation/target/parameters optional with defaults. Backward compatibility: tool_name accepted as alias for action. Language-neutral. All implementations must validate against this schema.
